profile.resume_text: HITARTH TRIVEDI  Vadodara, India | +91 99985 55392 | hitartht318@gmail.com  linkedin.com/in/hitarth - trivedi - ba1986300 | github.com/HitarthTrivedi |   https://rezum - alphakore.vercel.app/profile/hitarth -  trivedi - bb9dc563  PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY  AI/ML engineer specializing in multi - agent systems, adversarial AI architectures, and full - stack development. Founder of  Alpha.Kore   —   a 10 - member team that has shipped 11 projects including Python packages with 2,500+ downloads.  Experienced in RAG pipeline s, LLM orchestration, agentic memory systems, IoT integrations, and real - time computer  vision.  EDUCATION  Bachelor of Engineering   —   Computer Science | SVIT, Vasad  3rd Year, Pursuing | CGPA: 9.2 / 10  TECHNICAL SKILLS  Languages:   Python, JavaScript, Swift  AI & ML:   Multi - Agent System Design, Adversarial AI Architecture, Agentic RAG & Long - Term Memory Systems, LLM  Orchestration, Google Gemini API, Groq API (LLaMA 3.3 70B), Agent Routing & Task Decomposition, Quality Scoring  Systems  Backend & Web:   Python Flask, REST APIs, Google Drive API, Spotify Web API, OAuth 2.0, PyPI Publishing, React,  HTML5, CSS3, SwiftUI, AppKit  Systems & Tools:   Browser Automation (Selenium, undetected - chromedriver), IoT Sensor Integration, Computer  Vision, macOS System APIs, SQLAlchemy, Git, Homebrew Distribution, matplotlib, pandas  PROJECTS & APPLICATIONS  LazyCook   —   Multi - Agent AI Assistant | PyPI | 2,500+ Downloads  •   Architected a four - agent pipeline (Generator → Analyzer → Optimizer → Validator) on Gemini 2.5 Flash with a  weighted quality scoring engine (completeness 40%, accuracy 40%, length 20%)   —   responses below threshold  are automatically re - queued.  •   Built RAG - based document processing (.pdf, .docx, .txt, .md, .csv) with persistent cross - session context;  published on PyPI reaching 2,500+ downloads in 6 months   —   top 7% of Python contributors globally.  Agentic RAG Memory Engine   —   Extended Local LLM Context | Python  •   Engineered an agentic RAG system that extends the effective memory of local language models from ~33  conversations (5k - token context window) to 300+ conversations   —   a 9× improvement   —   by dynamically indexing,  compressing, and retrieving conversation histor y as semantic chunks.  •   Implemented keyword - indexed per - session storage with relevance - ranked retrieval, ensuring the most  contextually important past exchanges are injected at inference time with zero context overflow   —   enabling truly  persistent long - term memory for local LLMs.  3F1 (Three Faction Intelligence)   —   Triadic AI Debate Engine | Live at 3f1.in  •   Engineered a Neural Debate Architecture with three autonomous LLM agents   —   Analyst, Critic, and Synthesizer  —   engaging in structured adversarial debate to produce bias - reduced, cross - validated conclusions.  •   Integrated RAG to ground agent responses in retrieved context, reducing hallucination rates; deployed as a full -  s
